title: Icarus
description: Adds a bunch of colourful and unique wings that can be worn in the Trinkets Cape slot.
body:
Icarus is a small mod that adds a variety of colourful and unique wings that can be worn in the Back (Curios) or Cape (Trinkets) slot. The wings only have two drawbacks: they cost hunger while flying, and their max speed gets slowed down when wearing armour. The more armour you're wearing, the more you get slowed down, up to 2/3 of your normal max speed (configurable). There is also a tag that can have wings added to it via a datapack so that they don't use up hunger while flying. # Check out this awesome showcase by [Zeddy](https://www.youtube.com/@zeddyminecraft): # New Stamina System! --- ### Recipes: ![Crafting Recipes](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/723db6c848c7302197286a87aa3f3b12f178ac52.png) ---
